name: Agent Streaming
summary: Real-time message streaming between server and client using Server-Sent Events (SSE). Handles text content, tool use events, thinking state, and question interception for interactive agent sessions.
goals: Stream agent responses in real time via SSE to connected clients
Handle multiple event types: text, tool use, tool result, thinking, errors
Intercept AskUserQuestion tool calls and present them to users for interactive responses
Manage SSE client connections with proper cleanup on disconnect

acceptanceCriteria.given: An agent is processing a message
acceptanceCriteria.then: text events are streamed to the client via SSE in real time

acceptanceCriteria.given: An agent invokes the AskUserQuestion tool
acceptanceCriteria.when: the tool call is detected during streaming
acceptanceCriteria.then: streaming pauses and the question is presented to the user

acceptanceCriteria.given: A user submits an answer to an agent question
acceptanceCriteria.when: the answer is received by the server
acceptanceCriteria.then: the agent continues processing with the user's response

unit-test.then: the connection is cleaned up without server errors

end-to-end.given: An agent is running and user is watching the chat
end-to-end.when: the agent generates a multi-paragraph response
end-to-end.then: text appears progressively in the chat UI

end-to-end.given: An agent asks a question with options
end-to-end.then: the agent continues with the selected answer

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
